name: nemesis
summary: This is a Mythic agent for interacting with the 3rd party service, Nemesis.

documentation.readme: This is a Mythic agent for interacting with the 3rd party service, Nemesis.
usage_sections: sudo ./mythic-cli install github https://github.com/user/repo to install the main branch
sudo ./mythic-cli install github https://github.com/user/repo branchname to install a specific branch of that repo
sudo ./mythic-cli install folder /path/to/local/folder/cloned/from/github to install from an already cloned down version of an agent repo
Mythic isn't running, you can install the script and just run sudo ./mythic-cli start.
documentation.how_to_use: Clone or install `nemesis` from its upstream repository, then run `nemesis --help` (or the README entrypoint) to confirm flags. This is a Mythic agent for interacting with the 3rd party service, Nemesis.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [shell_linux] in the Penetration Testing category. Fits when the engagement needs: This is a Mythic agent for interacting with the 3rd party service, Nemesis.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: This is a Mythic agent for interacting with the 3rd party service, Nemesis.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.
